messages.sender_name: Master of Architecture, The University of Newcastle
messages.content:
Hey! Sorry for the delayed response, currently working through the backend of the semester (all nighter territory)!! 

We have had a chat collectively about utilising your venue however logistically we will have to decline on your very generous offer as our event (the exhibition) will end at 11pm. 

Thank you for your offer and we will pass on your details to the crew next year!! All the best.

We can do catering or a bar tab. There is no charge for us hosting.

Would you like the front bar to yourselves or are you happy for it to be accessible to all?
What time you thinking? As always Iâd love to have you.
Only thing to be aware of is we shut at midnight. Iâm not an all night partier like the 3am lass days :)
Iâve currently got a band from 8:45 and a dj in the beer garden from 3 or 5pm

messages.sender_name: Master of Architecture, The University of Newcastle

messages.sender_name: Master of Architecture, The University of Newcastle
